title: Phase 15.1 — First Run Final Correction
what_was_wrong: The original cron prompt focused too narrowly on indexing and technical checks. Authority/backlink acquisition was mentioned but not mandatory. Content opportunity, Pinterest monitor, and business gap tracking were not explicitly required in the daily report.

after.authority: STEP 8 — MANDATORY. Follow-ups + new prospects + tracker updates. Labeled 'NOT OPTIONAL.'
after.content: STEP 7 — MANDATORY. Must decide CREATE/IMPROVE/HOLD daily.
after.business_gaps: STEP 1 + STEP 13 — Revenue gap, traffic gap, authority gap explicitly calculated daily.
after.report_format: STEP 14 — Exact Telegram format with 🔴 OFF-TRACK markers for each KPI.

full_14_step_workflow: STEP 1: Business Scoreboard (GSC + visitors + revenue + authority + gap tracking)
STEP 2: Technical Health (ads.txt, hubs, sitemap, crons)
STEP 4: Query Discovery (zero-click, near-winner, calculator queries)
STEP 5: CTR & Near-Winner (fixes if non-cooldown, 10/day max)
STEP 8: AUTHORITY ENGINE — MANDATORY (follow-ups + new prospects + trackers)
STEP 9: Outreach Cross-Reference (align legacy + new trackers)
STEP 10: Monetization (AdSense status + revenue estimate + $50k gap)
STEP 12: Deploy & Validate (if source changes made)

expected_actions: ✅ Technical health verification (ads.txt, hubs, sitemap, crons)
✅ Tier 3 Batch 8: 10 calculators via GSC UI → 80/105 cumulative
✅ GSC URL Inspection recheck on previous batches
✅ Internal links: 10-15 from T1/T2 to new T3 batch
✅ Deploy: YES (if internal links modified source files)
✅ Daily report: full JSON + Telegram delivery

no_longer_waiting_for: Qasem daily prompts — cron runs automatically at 3 PM EEST
ChatGPT review — only for high-risk escalations
Manual indexing requests — GSC UI fully automated
